pattern: A two-state dynamic program tracking the best cash while holding versus not holding, paying the fee once per completed round trip.
hints: At any day you are either holding a share or you are not; track the maximum cash achievable in each state.
Buying lowers your held-state cash by the price, while selling raises your cash by the price minus the fee.
Sweep the prices updating hold = max(hold, cash - price) and cash = max(cash, hold + price - fee); the answer is the final cash.

edge_inputs.description: fee erases small gains so only the big swing pays
monotonically falling prices give zero profit
zero fee makes every upswing worth taking
fee larger than every gain blocks all trades

stress.description: random walk of prices with a moderate fee
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    prices = [rng.randrange(1, 49999) for _ in range(n)]
    fee = rng.randrange(0, 49999)
    return [prices, fee]

stress.description: narrow price band with a small fee to stress marginal trades
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    prices = [rng.randrange(50, 70) for _ in range(n)]
    fee = rng.randrange(0, 5)
    return [prices, fee]
